welcome.title: Welcome to Quorum
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant for better conversations

features.customParticipants: Create custom AI participants with specific roles
features.saveConfigs: Save and share your favorite configurations

apiNote.text: Requires API keys from LLM providers. Usage may incur costs based on provider pricing.

consent.title: API Keys & Privacy Notice
consent.intro: Quorum requires API keys to function. Please note:

points.storage: Your API keys can be stored in your browser based on your preference
points.processing: All processing happens in your browser - your conversations never leave your device
points.access: We don't have access to your API keys or data
points.options: You can choose how your keys are stored:

consent.agreement: I understand and agree to these terms

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose from a variety of themes to customize the appearance of the application. Your last selected light and dark themes will be remembered when toggling.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Enter your API keys for the language model providers you want to use. Your keys are stored locally in your browser and are never sent to our servers.
settings.participantsDescription: Manage AI participants for your round table discussions. Create, edit, and organize participants with different roles and personalities.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the appearance of the application.
settings.privacyDescription: Manage your privacy settings and data.
settings.aboutDescription: Quorum is an open-source application that allows you to chat with multiple AI models simultaneously in a round-table format.
settings.dataStorageDescription: Your data is stored locally in your browser. You can clear all data at any time.
settings.apiKeyStorageDescription: Choose how you want to store your API keys.
settings.sessionOnly: Session Only (cleared when browser is closed)

theme.themeToggleInfo: Toggle between your preferred light and dark themes
